extraction.one_line_summary: MOLARD Rudy attacked on the descent from the cat-2 summit with 9km to go, survived a late chase by DE MARCHI Alessandro and CLARKE Simon, and won despite cramping.
tactical_patterns: MOLARD attacked on descent not summit of cat-2 climb, exploiting hesitation in 25-rider breakaway with poor cooperation
AMADOR Andrey counter-attacked on final climb but lacked support, revealing GC riders probing without committing teammates
DE MARCHI and CLARKE bridged to MOLARD but waited too long, allowing him track-racing positioning advantage in final 3km

rider_signals.MOLARD Rudy: positive: won despite cramping when CAMALAMÉR attacked, showing track racing background enables cold tactical calculation under physical duress
rider_signals.MOLLEMA Bauke: neutral: flatted at worst possible moment on final climb approach but rejoined, revealing bad luck not weakness
rider_signals.AMADOR Andrey: neutral: animated on final climb but lacked teammates to sustain move, suggesting isolated GC probing
rider_signals.CLARKE Simon: negative: bridged to winning move but passive in final 3km, suggesting poor sprint after long stages
rider_signals.DE MARCHI Alessandro: negative: caught MOLARD on descent but outsmarted in positioning game despite being fast finisher
